title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the English and Foreign Languages UniversityAct, 2006. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 3rd August 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 1350(E), dated 1st August, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii)
